metadata.description: Marketplace of software-delivery skills for Claude Code, grouped into focused plugins you can install independently.

plugins.name: decisions
plugins.description: Explore, capture, and reconstruct the reasoning behind significant decisions as durable, reviewable Decision Records.

plugins.name: bdd
plugins.description: Author, automate, and reconcile behavior specifications in Gherkin, turning system behavior into executable specs.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Structure and carry out code reviews with a consistent, cost-of-change-driven framework and reviewer workflows.

plugins.name: engineering-practices
plugins.description: Guidelines that keep execution aligned with proven engineering practices.

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Shape units of work that are well-defined, verifiable, and ready to be executed.

plugins.name: authoring-skills
plugins.description: Craft and sharpen Claude Code skills so they behave reliably.
